_comment: Cost inputs derived from the actual deployed resource config (ecs.tf, rds.tf, fly.toml). This is a configuration-based estimate — no real billing data has been pulled from AWS Cost Explorer or the Fly dashboard yet. A deployment running 720 hours/month (desired_count=1, always-on) is assumed for AWS. Fly uses auto-stop so actual hours are lower.

fly.source: Fly.io pricing (shared-cpu-1x 1GB ~$2.07/mo if always-on; Fly Postgres shared CPU ~$3/mo). Auto-stop reduces actual app compute to ~$0.50/mo at idle; we use the always-on figure here to keep the Fly↔AWS comparison apples-to-apples (both at 100% availability).

aws.billing_source: derived from infra/aws/*.tf + us-west-2 public on-demand pricing, 720 hrs/month
